# Privacy Policy — Track Me

Last updated: 2026-07-09

Track Me is a local time-tracking Chrome extension.

## What data is processed

* Tasks, session timestamps, and extension settings.
* Optional backup files generated by the user or automatic backup setting.
* Optional feedback messages submitted through the in-extension feedback form.

## Where data is stored

* Data is stored locally in the browser using Chrome Extension storage (`chrome.storage.local`).
* Backup files are saved to the user's local Downloads folder (or user-selected location for manual backup).
* Feedback messages are stored in the extension owner's Google Forms / Google Sheets account when voluntarily submitted by the user.

## Data sharing

* Task data and settings remain stored locally in the browser.
* If you choose to send feedback, your message is transmitted to Google Forms (Google LLC) for review. Only the text you submit is sent — no tasks, timers, or backup data are included.
* Track Me does not sell, transfer, or share user data with third parties for advertising.

## Permissions used

* `storage` — to save tasks and settings locally.
* `downloads` — to create backup files on the user's device.
* `alarms` — to run optional hourly automatic backups when enabled.
* Access to `docs.google.com` — to submit optional user feedback to Google Forms.

## User control

* Users can delete tasks and local data directly in the extension.
* Users can enable/disable automatic backup in Settings.
* Feedback is sent only when the user explicitly submits the feedback form.
* Users can uninstall the extension at any time.

## Contact

For questions: weblineid@gmail.com
